name: CyReN
tagline: Secure, resilient, and intelligent next-generation networks.
intro: The Cyber Resilient Networks (CyReN) Lab develops the theory and systems that keep next-generation networks connected, secure, and intelligent under stress, attack, and uncertainty. Our work spans 5G and 6G open radio access networks, zero trust security, autonomous aerial systems, and AI-driven network management for mission-critical applications.

thrusts.title: NextG & O-RAN
thrusts.blurb: Network slicing, admission control, and multi-agent resource orchestration for ultra-reliable low-latency 5G and 6G open radio access networks.

thrusts.title: Cyber Resilience & Zero Trust
thrusts.blurb: Zero trust architectures, cyber risk quantification, and supply chain risk analysis that keep untrusted infrastructure trustworthy.

thrusts.title: Autonomous & Aerial Systems
thrusts.blurb: Distributed orchestration of UAV and robotic networks for coverage, connectivity, and resilient service in contested environments.

thrusts.title: AI-Driven Network Management
thrusts.blurb: Reinforcement learning, agentic AI, and large language model methods for autonomous network management and orchestration.
